tweetable: Week of Apr 18: 80 commits, +26.4k/-3.7k LOC, 28% tests, 39 PRs, v0.6.94 → v0.11.0 (45 versions, 3 majors in 36h) | Streak: 4d

notes.ship_of_the_week: v0.9.0 skill-mode parity (10,674 insertions, 91 files) — phase engine + shared lifecycle + error codes foundation
major_themes: M14 + M15 trilogy: v0.9 (rail) → v0.10 (cheap) → v0.11 (correct on first chat) shipped in 36 hours
Codex pre-implementation gate caught P1s in both M14 and M15 cycles — pattern now codified in feedback memory
Test ratio 17% → 28% via 'P1 finding → regression test in same PR' discipline
v0.7.x foundation stack: golden patterns, wiki retrieval, destructive ops, journal/memory loop
fix_chains: v0.7.6-0.7.11 destructive ops + DOUBLE_SIGN tiering (6 versions)
v0.7.28 hotfix (ERR_UNKNOWN_FILE_EXTENSION on fresh npm install -g)
growth_areas: Pre-tag smoke test still missing — recurring growth area from prior retro
CI publish auth set up but ran manual `pnpm publish` for v0.11.0 — break the manual fallback habit on v0.11.1
Late-night ship cluster (3 of 4 majors after 22:00) — install personal freeze policy
habits_established: Codex /codex consult on plan before implementation for cross-cutting changes
Pre-flight: tsc + prettier + vitest + build all run in parallel before push
Squash-merge on majors (v0.9.0 = 91 files in one main commit, bisect-friendly at version-tag level)
